data.name: label2.Text
data.value: One of the main features of CybAir is its flight booking system. Users can view available flights and select their seats through a clean and intuitive seat selection interface that shows real-time availability. This system ensures that seats cannot be double-booked, creating a realistic and efficient booking experience. Once a seat is selected, users are able to view their bookings within the app, along with important flight details such as seat number and flight information.

data.name: label3.Text
data.value: To further enhance the user experience, CybAir includes an in-app messaging system that allows clients to communicate directly with the server. This feature acts like a built-in help desk, where users can ask questions, report issues, or get confirmation on their bookings in real time. The communication between client and server is handled through network protocols that make the app feel fast and responsive.

data.name: label4.Text
data.value: The project was developed using C# and Windows Forms, following modular design principles to keep the code organized and maintainable. Each feature — from user roles to booking management to messaging — is part of a structured system that reflects both thoughtful design and practical programming. While security features are implemented in the background, the primary focus of CybAir is to deliver a smooth and realistic airline experience that demonstrates both technical skill and attention to user needs.

data.name: label5.Text
data.value: CybAir is not just a technical project — it’s a functional simulation of how real airline systems work, with a focus on reliability, usability, and clear design. It represents a complete and well-rounded effort to build software that feels both practical and engaging, bridging the gap between classroom learning and real-world application.

data.name: label1.Text
data.value: CybAir is a modern airline management system developed as part of a school project, designed to simulate the key functions of a real-world airline platform while providing a user-friendly and responsive experience. The application allows users to connect either as a client or a server, with only one active server at a time to manage the flow of communication and data. Once connected, users can access a range of features aimed at replicating the experience of booking and managing flights in a secure and interactive environment.
